plugins.name: homebrew-dev
plugins.description: Homebrew formula development toolkit — research packages, generate formulas from JSON schema, validate with brew audit/style, and batch-create formulas for a custom tap.

plugins.name: browser-extension-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive end-to-end support for building, testing, and deploying cross-browser extensions across Firefox, Chrome, and Safari with modern patterns, WASM integration, and best practices.

plugins.name: blog-workflow
plugins.description: Structured workflow for creating technical blog posts from research through publication. Supports tutorials, deep dives, research summaries, and development journals with consistent formatting and quality validation.

plugins.name: job-hunting
plugins.description: Comprehensive job hunting toolkit — analyze job descriptions, extract resume bullets from career history, identify skill gaps, tailor applications, and research employers with salary data.
